title: EXAMPLE 2.12 Graphical Convolution of Two Finite-Duration Functions
summary: This example computes the convolution of two finite-duration signals graphically by evaluating g(t) ∗ x(t) instead of x(t) ∗ g(t). The page derives piecewise expressions for the overlap integral over three time ranges and presents the resulting formulas in Eqs. (2.32)–(2.34).
